title: Pediatric asthma review

red_flags.text: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.
red_flags.rationale: Supports symptoms, school absence, reliever use, exacerbations, control, adherence and technique review for child asthma review; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1–1.6.4 — monitoring asthma control and uncontrolled asthma

examination.text: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.
examination.rationale: Supports child asthma symptoms, pattern, triggers, examination and objective tests for child asthma review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports wheeze, cough, breathlessness, chest tightness, symptom variation, nocturnal or seasonal pattern, triggers, atopy and family history, occupational context, respiratory examination, peak flow, FeNO, spirometry, and objective confirmation.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.4.6 — clinical history, examination, objective tests, and occupational asthma

medication.text: Supports inhaler-technique and adherence review at every review and clinician-documented personalised action-plan and trigger discussion without mapping medicine names or doses.
medication.rationale: Supports adherence, inhaler technique and clinician-documented action-plan review for child asthma review; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports inhaler-technique and adherence review at every review and clinician-documented personalised action-plan and trigger discussion without mapping medicine names or doses.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1 and 1.14.1–1.14.2 — inhaler technique, adherence, and action plans

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, diagnosis, symptoms, control score, exacerbations, medicines and doses, adherence, technique, objective tests, examination and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child asthma review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
